I've made the following changes to add validation for parameter name and description fields:

1. **Added validation in `createTool` function** - Prevents form submission if any parameter has an empty name or description

2. **Added validation in `updateTool` function** - Same validation for the update flow

3. **Updated parameter Name field** - Added required asterisk (*) indicator and red border when empty after validation attempt

4. **Updated parameter Description field** - Added required asterisk (*) indicator and red border when empty after validation attempt

Now when a user tries to add or update a tool with parameters that have empty name or description fields, those fields will be highlighted with a red border, and the form submission will be blocked until they are filled in.

@@ -62,4 +62,91 @@
      );
    };
+ 
+   // Helper to update a parameter at any depth using a path of IDs
+   const updateParameterAtPath = (
+     params: Parameter[],
+     path: string[],
+     updates: Partial&lt;Parameter&gt;
+   ): Parameter[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) return params;
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return params.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return { ...p, ...updates };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: updateParameterAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath, updates),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   // Helper to add a property at any depth
+   const addPropertyAtPath = (params: Parameter[], path: string[]): Parameter[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) return params;
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return params.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           properties: [
+             ...(p.properties || []),
+             {
+               id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+               dataType: "string",
+               name: "",
+               required: true,
+               description: "",
+             },
+           ],
+         };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: addPropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   // Helper to remove a property at any depth
+   const removePropertyAtPath = (
+     params: Parameter[],
+     path: string[],
+     idToRemove: string
+   ): Parameter[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       return params.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== idToRemove);
+     }
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return params.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           properties: (p.properties || []).filter((prop) =&gt; prop.id !== idToRemove),
+         };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: removePropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath, idToRemove),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   // Handlers that use the path-based helpers
+   const handleUpdateAtPath = (path: string[], updates: Partial&lt;Parameter&gt;) =&gt; {
+     setParameters((prev) =&gt; updateParameterAtPath(prev, path, updates));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleAddPropertyAtPath = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
+     setValidationAttempted(false);
+     setParameters((prev) =&gt; addPropertyAtPath(prev, path));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleRemoveAtPath = (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; {
+     setParameters((prev) =&gt; removePropertyAtPath(prev, parentPath, id));
+   };
  
    // Fetch tools from backend

The implementation is complete. Here's what I've done:

1. **Extended the `Parameter` type** to include an optional `properties` array for nested properties

2. **Added path-based helper functions** for efficient updates at any depth:
   - `updateParameterAtPath` - Updates a parameter at any nesting level
   - `addPropertyAtPath` - Adds a new property to an object parameter
   - `removePropertyAtPath` - Removes a property from any level

3. **Created a recursive `ParameterCard` component** that:
   - Renders the same form fields (data type, identifier/name, required, description)
   - Shows a "Properties" section when type is "object"
   - Recursively renders nested properties
   - Has an "Add property" button to add new nested properties

4. **Updated validation** to recursively check all nested properties

Now when you select "Object" as the data type, you'll see a Properties section with an "Add property" button. Clicking it adds a new property form inside that container. Each property can also be of type "object" and have its own nested properties, making it fully recursive.

---

The implementation is complete. Here's a summary of the changes:

1. **Extended the `Parameter` type** to include `items?: Parameter` for array types

2. **Added path-based helpers for items navigation** using `__items__` as a special marker:
   - `updateSingleParameterAtPath` - navigates and updates within items
   - `addPropertyToSingleParam` - adds properties to objects within items
   - `removePropertyFromSingleParam` - removes properties within items
   - `setItemsAtPath` / `setItemsOnSingleParam` - sets or removes items

3. **Updated validation** to recursively check array items (via `hasInvalidSingleParameter`)

4. **Updated `ParameterCard` component**:
   - Added `onSetItems` and `isArrayItem` props
   - Shows "Item" section when type is "array"
   - Array items don't show name/identifier or required checkbox (since array items don't have names)
   - Supports full recursion: arrays can contain objects

-                 &gt;
-                   {isCreatingDataPoint ? (

-                       &lt;svg

-                         &lt;circle

+   // Reset data field form
+   const resetDataFieldForm = () =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldDataType("string");
+     setDataFieldIdentifier("");
+     setDataFieldDescription("");
+     setDataFieldProperties([]);
+     setDataFieldItems(undefined);
+     setCreateDataFieldError(null);
+   };
+ 
+   // Helper functions for data field properties (recursive)
+   const addDataFieldProperty = () =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; [
+       ...prev,
+       {
+         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+         dataType: "string",
+         name: "",
+         description: "",
+       },
+     ]);
+   };
+ 
+   const updateDataFieldProperty = (
+     id: string,
+     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
+   ) =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt;
+       prev.map((p) =&gt; (p.id === id ? { ...p, ...updates } : p))
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   const removeDataFieldProperty = (id: string) =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; prev.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== id));
+   };
+ 
+   // Recursive property update at any depth
+   const updatePropertyAtPath = (
+     props: DataFieldProperty[],
+     path: string[],
+     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
+   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) return props;
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return { ...p, ...updates };
+       }
+       if (restPath[0] === "__items__") {
+         const currentItems = p.items || {
+           id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+           dataType: "string",
+           name: "",
+           description: "",
+         };
+         if (restPath.length === 1) {
+           return { ...p, items: { ...currentItems, ...updates } };
+         }
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           items: updateSinglePropertyAtPath(currentItems, restPath.slice(1), updates),
+         };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: updatePropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath, updates),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const updateSinglePropertyAtPath = (
+     prop: DataFieldProperty,
+     path: string[],
+     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
+   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       return { ...prop, ...updates };
+     }
+     const [currentSegment, ...restPath] = path;
+     if (currentSegment === "__items__") {
+       const currentItems = prop.items || {
+         id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+         dataType: "string",
+         name: "",
+         description: "",
+       };
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return { ...prop, items: { ...currentItems, ...updates } };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...prop,
+         items: updateSinglePropertyAtPath(currentItems, restPath, updates),
+       };
+     }
+     return {
+       ...prop,
+       properties: updatePropertyAtPath(prop.properties || [], path, updates),
+     };
+   };
+ 
+   const addPropertyAtPath = (
+     props: DataFieldProperty[],
+     path: string[]
+   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) return props;
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           properties: [
+             ...(p.properties || []),
+             {
+               id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+               dataType: "string",
+               name: "",
+               description: "",
+             },
+           ],
+         };
+       }
+       if (restPath[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; p.items) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           items: addPropertyToSingleProp(p.items, restPath.slice(1)),
+         };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: addPropertyAtPath(p.properties || [], restPath),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const addPropertyToSingleProp = (
+     prop: DataFieldProperty,
+     path: string[]
+   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       return {
+         ...prop,
+         properties: [
+           ...(prop.properties || []),
+           {
+             id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+             dataType: "string",
+             name: "",
+             description: "",
+           },
+         ],
+       };
+     }
+     if (path[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
+       return {
+         ...prop,
+         items: addPropertyToSingleProp(prop.items, path.slice(1)),
+       };
+     }
+     return {
+       ...prop,
+       properties: addPropertyAtPath(prop.properties || [], path),
+     };
+   };
+ 
+   const removePropertyAtPath = (
+     props: DataFieldProperty[],
+     path: string[],
+     idToRemove: string
+   ): DataFieldProperty[] =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       return props.filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== idToRemove);
+     }
+     const [currentId, ...restPath] = path;
+     return props.map((p) =&gt; {
+       if (p.id !== currentId) return p;
+       if (restPath[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; p.items) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           items: removePropertyFromSingleProp(
+             p.items,
+             restPath.slice(1),
+             idToRemove
+           ),
+         };
+       }
+       if (restPath.length === 0) {
+         return {
+           ...p,
+           properties: (p.properties || []).filter(
+             (prop) =&gt; prop.id !== idToRemove
+           ),
+         };
+       }
+       return {
+         ...p,
+         properties: removePropertyAtPath(
+           p.properties || [],
+           restPath,
+           idToRemove
+         ),
+       };
+     });
+   };
+ 
+   const removePropertyFromSingleProp = (
+     prop: DataFieldProperty,
+     path: string[],
+     idToRemove: string
+   ): DataFieldProperty =&gt; {
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       return {
+         ...prop,
+         properties: (prop.properties || []).filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== idToRemove),
+       };
+     }
+     if (path[0] === "__items__" &amp;&amp; prop.items) {
+       return {
+         ...prop,
+         items: removePropertyFromSingleProp(
+           prop.items,
+           path.slice(1),
+           idToRemove
+         ),
+       };
+     }
+     return {
+       ...prop,
+       properties: removePropertyAtPath(
+         prop.properties || [],
+         path,
+         idToRemove
+       ),
+     };
+   };
+ 
+   // Handlers for nested properties
+   const handleUpdatePropertyAtPath = (
+     path: string[],
+     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
+   ) =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; updatePropertyAtPath(prev, path, updates));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleAddPropertyAtPath = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt; addPropertyAtPath(prev, path));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleRemovePropertyAtPath = (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; {
+     setDataFieldProperties((prev) =&gt;
+       removePropertyAtPath(prev, parentPath, id)
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   // Items handlers for top-level array
+   const updateDataFieldItemsAtPath = (
+     path: string[],
+     updates: Partial&lt;DataFieldProperty&gt;
+   ) =&gt; {
+     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt; (prev ? { ...prev, ...updates } : prev));
+       return;
+     }
+     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+       prev ? updateSinglePropertyAtPath(prev, path, updates) : prev
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   const addPropertyToItems = (path: string[]) =&gt; {
+     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
+     if (path.length === 0) {
+       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+         prev
+           ? {
+               ...prev,
+               properties: [
+                 ...(prev.properties || []),
+                 {
+                   id: crypto.randomUUID(),
+                   dataType: "string",
+                   name: "",
+                   description: "",
+                 },
+               ],
+             }
+           : prev
+       );
+       return;
+     }
+     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+       prev ? addPropertyToSingleProp(prev, path) : prev
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   const removePropertyFromItems = (parentPath: string[], id: string) =&gt; {
+     if (!dataFieldItems) return;
+     if (parentPath.length === 0) {
+       setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+         prev
+           ? {
+               ...prev,
+               properties: (prev.properties || []).filter((p) =&gt; p.id !== id),
+             }
+           : prev
+       );
+       return;
+     }
+     setDataFieldItems((prev) =&gt;
+       prev ? removePropertyFromSingleProp(prev, parentPath, id) : prev
+     );
+   };
+ 
+   // Evaluation criteria sidebar state
+   const [addCriteriaSidebarOpen, setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen] = useState(false);
+   const [criteriaName, setCriteriaName] = useState("");
+   const [criteriaInstructions, setCriteriaInstructions] = useState("");
+   const [isCreatingCriteria, setIsCreatingCriteria] = useState(false);
+   const [createCriteriaError, setCreateCriteriaError] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(
+     null
+   );
+ 
+   // Evaluation criteria list state
+   type EvaluationCriteriaData = {
+     uuid: string;
+     name: string;
+     description: string;
+     agent_id: string;
+     created_at: string;
+     updated_at: string;
+   };
+   const [evaluationCriteria, setEvaluationCriteria] = useState&lt;
+     EvaluationCriteriaData[]
+   &gt;([]);
+   const [evaluationCriteriaLoading, setEvaluationCriteriaLoading] =
+     useState(false);
+   const [evaluationCriteriaError, setEvaluationCriteriaError] = useState&lt;
+     string | null
+   &gt;(null);
+ 
+   // Reset criteria form
+   const resetCriteriaForm = () =&gt; {
+     setCriteriaName("");
+     setCriteriaInstructions("");
+     setCreateCriteriaError(null);

+ 
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     const fetchAgent = async () =&gt; {
+       try {
+         setIsLoading(true);
+         setError(null);
+         const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+         if (!backendUrl) {
+           throw new Error("BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set");
+         }
+ 
+         const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agents/${agentUuid}&#96;, {
+           method: "GET",
+           headers: {
+             accept: "application/json",
+             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+           },
+         });
+ 
+         if (!response.ok) {
+           throw new Error("Failed to fetch agent");
+         }
+ 
+         const data: AgentData = await response.json();
+         setAgent(data);
+ 
+         // Initialize form fields from agent config if available
+         if (data.config) {
+           if (data.config.system_prompt) {
+             setSystemPrompt(data.config.system_prompt);
+           }
+           if (data.config.stt?.provider) {
+             setSttProvider(data.config.stt.provider);
+           }
+           if (data.config.tts?.provider) {
+             setTtsProvider(data.config.tts.provider);
+           }
+           if (data.config.llm?.model) {
+             // Find the matching LLM model from the providers list
+             const modelId = data.config.llm.model;
+             let foundModel: LLMModel | null = null;
+             for (const provider of llmProviders) {
+               const model = provider.models.find((m) =&gt; m.id === modelId);
+               if (model) {
+                 foundModel = model;
+                 break;
+               }
+             }
+             if (foundModel) {
+               setSelectedLLM(foundModel);
+             } else {
+               // If model not found in list, create a basic entry
+               setSelectedLLM({ id: modelId, name: modelId });
+             }
+           }
+           if (data.config.settings?.agent_speaks_first !== undefined) {
+             setAgentSpeaksFirst(data.config.settings.agent_speaks_first);
+           }
+           if (data.config.system_tools?.end_call !== undefined) {
+             setEndConversationEnabled(data.config.system_tools.end_call);
+           }
+         }
+       } catch (err) {
+         console.error("Error fetching agent:", err);
+         setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : "Failed to load agent");
+       } finally {
+         setIsLoading(false);
+       }
+     };
+ 
+     if (agentUuid) {
+       fetchAgent();
+     }
+ 
+     // Cleanup: clear header when component unmounts
+     return () =&gt; {
+       if (onHeaderUpdate) {
+         onHeaderUpdate(null);
+       }
+     };
+   }, [agentUuid, onHeaderUpdate]);
+ 
+   // Fetch tools linked to this agent

+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/Link&gt;
+             &lt;h1 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;{agent.name}&lt;/h1&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; saveRef.current()}
+             disabled={isSaving}
+             className="h-8 px-6 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-70 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+           &gt;
+             {isSaving &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;svg
+                 className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                 fill="none"
+                 viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;circle
+                   className="opacity-25"
+                   cx="12"
+                   cy="12"
+                   r="10"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth="4"
+                 &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                 &lt;path
+                   className="opacity-75"
+                   fill="currentColor"
+                   d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                 &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             )}
+             {isSaving ? "" : "Save"}
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       );
+     }
+   }, [agent, isSaving, onHeaderUpdate]);
+ 
+   // Auto-dismiss toast after 3 seconds
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     if (showSaveToast) {
+       const timer = setTimeout(() =&gt; {
+         setShowSaveToast(false);
+       }, 3000);
+       return () =&gt; clearTimeout(timer);
+     }
+   }, [showSaveToast]);
+ 
+   if (isLoading) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+           &lt;svg className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+             &lt;circle
+               className="opacity-25"
+               cx="12"
+               cy="12"
+               r="10"
+               stroke="currentColor"
+               strokeWidth="4"
+             &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+             &lt;path
+               className="opacity-75"
+               fill="currentColor"
+               d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+             &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+           &lt;/svg&gt;
+           &lt;span className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+             Loading agent...
+           &lt;/span&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   if (error) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;{error}&lt;/p&gt;
+           &lt;button
+             onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+             className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+           &gt;
+             Retry
+           &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   if (!agent) {
+     return (
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center h-64"&gt;
+         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;Agent not found&lt;/p&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     );
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+       {/* Tabs Navigation */}
+       &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-6 border-b border-border -mt-6"&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; handleTabChange("agent")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "agent"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Agent
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; handleTabChange("tools")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "tools"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Tools
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; handleTabChange("data-extraction")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "data-extraction"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Data extraction
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; handleTabChange("evaluation")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "evaluation"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Evaluation
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+         &lt;button
+           onClick={() =&gt; handleTabChange("settings")}
+           className={&#96;pb-2 text-base font-medium transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+             activeTab === "settings"
+               ? "text-foreground border-b-2 border-foreground"
+               : "text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground"
+           }&#96;}
+         &gt;
+           Settings
+         &lt;/button&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+       {/* Agent Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "agent" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-8 h-[calc(100vh-200px)]"&gt;
+           {/* Left Column: System Prompt */}
+           &lt;div className="flex flex-col"&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;label className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                 System prompt
+               &lt;/label&gt;
+               &lt;div className="relative group"&gt;
+                 &lt;button className="text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M9.879 7.519c1.171-1.025 3.071-1.025 4.242 0 1.172 1.025 1.172 2.687 0 3.712-.203.179-.43.326-.67.442-.745.361-1.45.999-1.45 1.827v.75M21 12a9 9 0 11-18 0 9 9 0 0118 0zm-9 5.25h.008v.008H12v-.008z"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute left-0 top-full mt-2 w-72 p-3 bg-white text-gray-900 text-base leading-relaxed rounded-lg shadow-lg opacity-0 invisible group-hover:opacity-100 group-hover:visible transition-all duration-200 z-50"&gt;
+                   The system prompt is used to determine the persona of the
+                   agent and the context of the conversation.
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;div className="bg-muted/30 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border border-border flex-1"&gt;
+               &lt;textarea
+                 value={systemPrompt}
+                 onChange={(e) =&gt; setSystemPrompt(e.target.value)}
+                 className="w-full h-full px-4 py-3 text-base bg-muted/30 text-foreground focus:outline-none resize-none"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Right Column: STT, TTS, LLM */}
+           &lt;div className="space-y-8"&gt;
+             {/* Speech To Text */}
+             &lt;div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                     Speech To Text
+                   &lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                     Select the STT provider for the agent
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                   &lt;select
+                     value={sttProvider}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setSttProvider(e.target.value)}
+                     className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                   &gt;
+                     {sttProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                         {provider.label}
+                       &lt;/option&gt;
+                     ))}
+                   &lt;/select&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth={2}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                         d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Text To Speech */}
+             &lt;div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                     Text To Speech
+                   &lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                     Select the TTS provider for the agent
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                   &lt;select
+                     value={ttsProvider}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setTtsProvider(e.target.value)}
+                     className="w-full h-10 px-4 pr-10 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent cursor-pointer appearance-none"
+                   &gt;
+                     {ttsProviders.map((provider) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;option key={provider.value} value={provider.value}&gt;
+                         {provider.label}
+                       &lt;/option&gt;
+                     ))}
+                   &lt;/select&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 right-0 flex items-center pr-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth={2}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                         d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* LLM */}
+             &lt;div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;LLM&lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                     Select which provider and model to use for the LLM
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="mt-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(true)}
+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 flex items-center justify-between cursor-pointer transition-colors"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;span
+                     className={
+                       selectedLLM ? "text-foreground" : "text-muted-foreground"
+                     }
+                   &gt;
+                     {selectedLLM ? selectedLLM.name : "Select LLM model"}
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M19.5 8.25l-7.5 7.5-7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* LLM Selection Modal */}
+       {llmModalOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-16 bg-black/50"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             {/* Modal Header */}
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(false)}
+                   className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-5 h-5"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M15.75 19.5L8.25 12l7.5-7.5"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;h2 className="text-base font-semibold"&gt;Select LLM&lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; setLlmModalOpen(false)}
+                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Search Input */}
+             &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
+               &lt;input
+                 type="text"
+                 value={llmSearchQuery}
+                 onChange={(e) =&gt; setLlmSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+                 placeholder="Search LLM"
+                 className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-muted/30 text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+               /&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Models List */}
+             &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto"&gt;
+               {llmProviders.map((provider) =&gt; {
+                 const filteredModels = provider.models.filter(
+                   (model) =&gt;
+                     model.name
+                       .toLowerCase()
+                       .includes(llmSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+                     provider.name
+                       .toLowerCase()
+                       .includes(llmSearchQuery.toLowerCase())
+                 );
+                 if (filteredModels.length === 0) return null;
+                 return (
+                   &lt;div key={provider.name} className="py-2"&gt;
+                     &lt;h3 className="px-4 py-2 text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                       {provider.name}
+                     &lt;/h3&gt;
+                     {filteredModels.map((model) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;button
+                         key={model.id}
+                         onClick={() =&gt; {
+                           setSelectedLLM(model);
+                           setLlmModalOpen(false);
+                           setLlmSearchQuery("");
+                         }}
+                         className={&#96;w-full px-4 py-3 flex items-center hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                           selectedLLM?.id === model.id ? "bg-muted/50" : ""
+                         }&#96;}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;span className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                           {model.name}
+                         &lt;/span&gt;
+                       &lt;/button&gt;
+                     ))}
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 );
+               })}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Tools Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "tools" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+           {/* Header */}
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+             &lt;button
+               onClick={() =&gt; setAddToolDialogOpen(true)}
+               className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+             &gt;
+               Add tool
+             &lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-6"&gt;
+             {/* Left Column - Tools List */}
+             &lt;div className="col-span-2 space-y-4"&gt;
+               {/* Search Input */}
+               &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="absolute inset-y-0 left-0 flex items-center pl-3 pointer-events-none"&gt;
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth={2}
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       strokeLinecap="round"
+                       strokeLinejoin="round"
+                       d="M21 21l-5.197-5.197m0 0A7.5 7.5 0 105.196 5.196a7.5 7.5 0 0010.607 10.607z"
+                     /&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;input
+                   type="text"
+                   value={toolsSearchQuery}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setToolsSearchQuery(e.target.value)}
+                   placeholder="Search tools"
+                   className="w-full h-10 pl-10 pr-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               {/* Tools List / Loading / Error / Empty State */}
+               {agentToolsLoading ? (
+                 &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;circle
+                         className="opacity-25"
+                         cx="12"
+                         cy="12"
+                         r="10"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth="4"
+                       &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         className="opacity-75"
+                         fill="currentColor"
+                         d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                       &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : agentToolsError ? (
+                 &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;
+                     {agentToolsError}
+                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;button
+                     onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+                     className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                   &gt;
+                     Retry
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : agentTools.filter(
+                   (tool) =&gt;
+                     tool.name
+                       .toLowerCase()
+                       .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+                     (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+                       tool.config?.description
+                         .toLowerCase()
+                         .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+                 ).length === 0 ? (
+                 &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth={1.5}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                         d="M11.42 15.17L17.25 21A2.652 2.652 0 0021 17.25l-5.877-5.877M11.42 15.17l2.496-3.03c.317-.384.74-.626 1.208-.766M11.42 15.17l-4.655 5.653a2.548 2.548 0 11-3.586-3.586l6.837-5.63m5.108-.233c.55-.164 1.163-.188 1.743-.14a4.5 4.5 0 004.486-6.336l-3.276 3.277a3.004 3.004 0 01-2.25-2.25l3.276-3.276a4.5 4.5 0 00-6.336 4.486c.091 1.076-.071 2.264-.904 2.95l-.102.085m-1.745 1.437L5.909 7.5H4.5L2.25 3.75l1.5-1.5L7.5 4.5v1.409l4.26 4.26m-1.745 1.437l1.745-1.437m6.615 8.206L15.75 15.75M4.867 19.125h.008v.008h-.008v-.008z"

+                   &gt;
+                     Add tool
+                   &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                   {/* Table Header */}
+                   &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                       Name
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                       Description
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="w-10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   {/* Table Body */}
+                   {agentTools
+                     .filter(
+                       (tool) =&gt;
+                         tool.name
+                           .toLowerCase()
+                           .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+                         (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+                           tool.config?.description
+                             .toLowerCase()
+                             .includes(toolsSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+                     )
+                     .map((tool) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;div
+                         key={tool.uuid}
+                         className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-4 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
+                       &gt;
+                         {/* Name Column */}
+                         &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                           &lt;div className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                             {tool.name}
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                         {/* Description Column */}
+                         &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                           &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                             {tool.config?.description || "—"}
+                           &lt;/p&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                         {/* Delete Button */}
+                         &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                           &lt;button
+                             onClick={() =&gt; {
+                               setToolToDelete(tool);
+                               setDeleteToolDialogOpen(true);
+                             }}
+                             className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                             title="Remove tool from agent"
+                           &gt;
+                             &lt;svg
+                               className="w-5 h-5"
+                               fill="none"
+                               viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                               stroke="currentColor"
+                               strokeWidth={1.5}
+                             &gt;
+                               &lt;path
+                                 strokeLinecap="round"
+                                 strokeLinejoin="round"
+                                 d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
+                               /&gt;
+                             &lt;/svg&gt;
+                           &lt;/button&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     ))}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Right Column - In-built Tools */}
+             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                   In-built tools
+                 &lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                   Allow the agent to perform built-in actions.
+                 &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+                 {/* Active tools counter */}
+                 &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 bg-muted/30 border-b border-border"&gt;
+                   &lt;span className="text-base text-foreground"&gt;
+                     {endConversationEnabled ? "1" : "0"} active tools
+                   &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                 {/* In-built tools list */}
+                 {INBUILT_TOOLS.map((tool) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;div
+                     key={tool.id}
+                     className="px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between border-b border-border last:border-b-0"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth={1.5}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           strokeLinecap="round"
+                           strokeLinejoin="round"
+                           d={getInbuiltToolIcon(tool.icon)}
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;
+                       &lt;span className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                         {tool.name}
+                       &lt;/span&gt;
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                     {/* Toggle Switch */}
+                     &lt;button
+                       onClick={() =&gt; {
+                         if (tool.id === "end_call") {
+                           setEndConversationEnabled(!endConversationEnabled);
+                         }
+                       }}
+                       className={&#96;relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                         tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
+                           ? "bg-foreground"
+                           : "bg-muted"
+                       }&#96;}
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;div
+                         className={&#96;absolute top-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-background transition-transform ${
+                           tool.id === "end_call" &amp;&amp; endConversationEnabled
+                             ? "translate-x-5"
+                             : "translate-x-0.5"
+                         }&#96;}
+                       /&gt;
+                     &lt;/button&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 ))}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Add Tool Dialog */}
+       {addToolDialogOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-2xl max-h-[80vh] flex flex-col shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             {/* Dialog Header */}
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-border"&gt;
+               &lt;h2 className="text-base font-semibold"&gt;Add Tools&lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
+                   setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
+                   setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
+                 }}
+                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-md hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Tools List */}
+             &lt;div className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4"&gt;
+               {allToolsLoading ? (
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-center py-8"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                     &lt;svg
+                       className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                       fill="none"
+                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;circle
+                         className="opacity-25"
+                         cx="12"
+                         cy="12"
+                         r="10"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth="4"
+                       &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                       &lt;path
+                         className="opacity-75"
+                         fill="currentColor"
+                         d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                       &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
+                 (() =&gt; {
+                   // Filter out tools already added to the agent
+                   const agentToolUuids = new Set(agentTools.map((t) =&gt; t.uuid));
+                   const baseAvailableTools = allTools.filter(
+                     (tool) =&gt; !agentToolUuids.has(tool.uuid)
+                   );
+ 
+                   // If no tools are available at all (all added to agent), show message without search
+                   if (baseAvailableTools.length === 0) {
+                     return (
+                       &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                         &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                           All available tools have been added to this agent
+                         &lt;/p&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+                     );
+                   }
+ 
+                   // Filter by search query
+                   const availableTools = baseAvailableTools.filter(
+                     (tool) =&gt;
+                       tool.name
+                         .toLowerCase()
+                         .includes(addToolDialogSearchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||
+                       (tool.config?.description &amp;&amp;
+                         tool.config?.description
+                           .toLowerCase()
+                           .includes(addToolDialogSearchQuery.toLowerCase()))
+                   );
+ 
+                   return (
+                     &lt;&gt;
+                       {/* Search Input - only shown when there are tools to search */}
+                       &lt;div className="mb-4"&gt;
+                         &lt;input
+                           type="text"
+                           value={addToolDialogSearchQuery}
+                           onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                             setAddToolDialogSearchQuery(e.target.value)
+                           }
+                           placeholder="Search tools"
+                           className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+                       {availableTools.length === 0 ? (
+                         &lt;div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-8 text-center"&gt;
+                           &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                             No tools match your search
+                           &lt;/p&gt;
+                         &lt;/div&gt;
+                       ) : (
+                         availableTools.map((tool) =&gt; {
+                           const isSelected = selectedToolsForAdd.has(tool.uuid);
+                           return (
+                             &lt;button
+                               key={tool.uuid}
+                               onClick={() =&gt; {
+                                 // Toggle tool selection
+                                 setSelectedToolsForAdd((prev) =&gt; {
+                                   const newSet = new Set(prev);
+                                   if (newSet.has(tool.uuid)) {
+                                     newSet.delete(tool.uuid);
+                                   } else {
+                                     newSet.add(tool.uuid);
+                                   }
+                                   return newSet;
+                                 });
+                               }}
+                               className={&#96;w-full p-4 rounded-lg border transition-colors cursor-pointer text-left mb-3 last:mb-0 ${
+                                 isSelected
+                                   ? "border-foreground bg-muted/50"
+                                   : "border-border bg-muted/30 hover:bg-muted/50"
+                               }&#96;}
+                             &gt;
+                               &lt;div className="flex items-start gap-3"&gt;
+                                 {/* Checkbox */}
+                                 &lt;div
+                                   className={&#96;w-5 h-5 rounded border flex-shrink-0 flex items-center justify-center mt-0.5 transition-colors ${
+                                     isSelected
+                                       ? "bg-foreground border-foreground"
+                                       : "border-border"
+                                   }&#96;}
+                                 &gt;
+                                   {isSelected &amp;&amp; (
+                                     &lt;svg
+                                       className="w-3 h-3 text-background"
+                                       fill="none"
+                                       viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                                       stroke="currentColor"
+                                       strokeWidth={3}
+                                     &gt;
+                                       &lt;path
+                                         strokeLinecap="round"
+                                         strokeLinejoin="round"
+                                         d="M4.5 12.75l6 6 9-13.5"
+                                       /&gt;
+                                     &lt;/svg&gt;
+                                   )}
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                                 &lt;div&gt;
+                                   &lt;h4 className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                                     {tool.name}
+                                   &lt;/h4&gt;
+                                   &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-1 line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                                     {tool.config?.description}
+                                   &lt;/p&gt;
+                                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                               &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;/button&gt;
+                           );
+                         })
+                       )}
+                     &lt;/&gt;
+                   );
+                 })()
+               )}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             {/* Footer - only shown when tools are selected */}
+             {selectedToolsForAdd.size &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;div className="px-4 py-3 border-t border-border flex items-center justify-end"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                     try {
+                       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                       if (!backendUrl) {
+                         throw new Error(
+                           "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
+                         );
+                       }
+ 
+                       const toolUuidsToAdd = Array.from(selectedToolsForAdd);
+ 
+                       const response = await fetch(
+                         &#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;,
+                         {
+                           method: "POST",
+                           headers: {
+                             accept: "application/json",
+                             "Content-Type": "application/json",
+                             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                           },
+                           body: JSON.stringify({
+                             agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+                             tool_uuids: toolUuidsToAdd,
+                           }),
+                         }
+                       );
+ 
+                       if (!response.ok) {
+                         throw new Error("Failed to add tools to agent");
+                       }
+ 
+                       // Add tools to local state
+                       const addedTools = allTools.filter((tool) =&gt;
+                         toolUuidsToAdd.includes(tool.uuid)
+                       );
+                       setAgentTools((prev) =&gt; [...prev, ...addedTools]);
+ 
+                       // Close dialog and reset state
+                       setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
+                       setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
+                       setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
+                     } catch (err) {
+                       console.error("Error adding tools to agent:", err);
+                     }
+                   }}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-white text-gray-900 hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+                 &gt;
+                   Add ({selectedToolsForAdd.size})
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             )}
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               setAddToolDialogOpen(false);
+               setAddToolDialogSearchQuery("");
+               setSelectedToolsForAdd(new Set());
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Delete Tool Confirmation Dialog */}
+       {deleteToolDialogOpen &amp;&amp; toolToDelete &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex items-center justify-center bg-black/50"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="bg-background border border-border rounded-xl w-full max-w-md p-6 shadow-2xl"&gt;
+             &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-2"&gt;
+               Remove tool
+             &lt;/h2&gt;
+             &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-6"&gt;
+               Are you sure you want to remove this tool from this agent?
+             &lt;/p&gt;
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                   setToolToDelete(null);
+                 }}
+                 disabled={isDeleting}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+               &gt;
+                 Cancel
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                   try {
+                     setIsDeleting(true);
+                     const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                     if (!backendUrl) {
+                       throw new Error(
+                         "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
+                       );
+                     }
+ 
+                     const response = await fetch(&#96;${backendUrl}/agent-tools&#96;, {
+                       method: "DELETE",
+                       headers: {
+                         accept: "application/json",
+                         "Content-Type": "application/json",
+                         "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                       },
+                       body: JSON.stringify({
+                         agent_uuid: agentUuid,
+                         tool_uuid: toolToDelete.uuid,
+                       }),
+                     });
+ 
+                     if (!response.ok) {
+                       throw new Error("Failed to remove tool from agent");
+                     }
+ 
+                     // Remove tool from local state
+                     setAgentTools((prev) =&gt;
+                       prev.filter((t) =&gt; t.uuid !== toolToDelete.uuid)
+                     );
+ 
+                     // Close dialog
+                     setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                     setToolToDelete(null);
+                   } catch (err) {
+                     console.error("Error removing tool from agent:", err);
+                   } finally {
+                     setIsDeleting(false);
+                   }
+                 }}
+                 disabled={isDeleting}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-sm font-medium bg-red-800 text-white hover:bg-red-900 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2"
+               &gt;
+                 {isDeleting &amp;&amp; (
+                   &lt;svg
+                     className="w-4 h-4 animate-spin"
+                     fill="none"
+                     viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;circle
+                       className="opacity-25"
+                       cx="12"
+                       cy="12"
+                       r="10"
+                       stroke="currentColor"
+                       strokeWidth="4"
+                     &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                     &lt;path
+                       className="opacity-75"
+                       fill="currentColor"
+                       d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                     &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                   &lt;/svg&gt;
+                 )}
+                 {isDeleting ? "Removing..." : "Remove"}
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Backdrop click to close */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 -z-10"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {
+               if (!isDeleting) {
+                 setDeleteToolDialogOpen(false);
+                 setToolToDelete(null);
+               }
+             }}
+           /&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Evaluation Tab Content */}
+       {activeTab === "evaluation" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+           {/* Header with Add button */}
+           {evaluationCriteria.length &gt; 0 &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   resetCriteriaForm();
+                   setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(true);
+                 }}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium bg-foreground text-background hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Add criteria
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+ 
+           {/* Loading State */}
+           {evaluationCriteriaLoading ? (
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 animate-spin"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;circle
+                     className="opacity-25"
+                     cx="12"
+                     cy="12"
+                     r="10"
+                     stroke="currentColor"
+                     strokeWidth="4"
+                   &gt;&lt;/circle&gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     className="opacity-75"
+                     fill="currentColor"
+                     d="M4 12a8 8 0 018-8V0C5.373 0 0 5.373 0 12h4zm2 5.291A7.962 7.962 0 014 12H0c0 3.042 1.135 5.824 3 7.938l3-2.647z"
+                   &gt;&lt;/path&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : evaluationCriteriaError ? (
+             /* Error State */
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-red-500 mb-2"&gt;
+                 {evaluationCriteriaError}
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; window.location.reload()}
+                 className="text-base text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Retry
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : evaluationCriteria.length === 0 ? (
+             /* Empty State */
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-muted/20"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="w-14 h-14 rounded-xl bg-muted flex items-center justify-center mb-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-7 h-7 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M9 12.75L11.25 15 15 9.75M21 12c0 1.268-.63 2.39-1.593 3.068a3.745 3.745 0 01-1.043 3.296 3.745 3.745 0 01-3.296 1.043A3.745 3.745 0 0112 21c-1.268 0-2.39-.63-3.068-1.593a3.746 3.746 0 01-3.296-1.043 3.745 3.745 0 01-1.043-3.296A3.745 3.745 0 013 12c0-1.268.63-2.39 1.593-3.068a3.745 3.745 0 011.043-3.296 3.746 3.746 0 013.296-1.043A3.746 3.746 0 0112 3c1.268 0 2.39.63 3.068 1.593a3.746 3.746 0 013.296 1.043 3.746 3.746 0 011.043 3.296A3.745 3.745 0 0121 12z"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;h3 className="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mb-1"&gt;
+                 No evaluation criteria defined
+               &lt;/h3&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4 text-center max-w-2xl"&gt;
+                 Define criteria to evaluate whether conversations were
+                 successful or not
+               &lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   resetCriteriaForm();
+                   setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(true);
+                 }}
+                 className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 Add criteria
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ) : (
+             /* Criteria List */
+             &lt;div className="border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden"&gt;
+               {/* Table Header */}
+               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-3 border-b border-border bg-muted/30"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   Name
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-sm font-medium text-muted-foreground"&gt;
+                   Description
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="w-10"&gt;&lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               {/* Table Body */}
+               {evaluationCriteria.map((criteria) =&gt; (
+                 &lt;div
+                   key={criteria.uuid}
+                   className="grid grid-cols-[1fr_2fr_auto] gap-4 px-4 py-4 border-b border-border last:border-b-0 hover:bg-muted/20 transition-colors"
+                 &gt;
+                   {/* Name Column */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;div className="text-base font-medium text-foreground"&gt;
+                       {criteria.name}
+                     &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   {/* Description Column */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="text-base text-muted-foreground line-clamp-2"&gt;
+                       {criteria.description || "—"}
+                     &lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   {/* Delete Button */}
+                   &lt;div className="flex items-center"&gt;
+                     &lt;button
+                       onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                         if (
+                           !confirm(
+                             &#96;Are you sure you want to delete "${criteria.name}"?&#96;
+                           )
+                         )
+                           return;
+ 
+                         try {
+                           const backendUrl =
+                             process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                           if (!backendUrl) {
+                             throw new Error(
+                               "BACKEND_URL environment variable is not set"
+                             );
+                           }
+ 
+                           const response = await fetch(
+                             &#96;${backendUrl}/evaluation-criteria/${criteria.uuid}&#96;,
+                             {
+                               method: "DELETE",
+                               headers: {
+                                 accept: "application/json",
+                                 "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                               },
+                             }
+                           );
+ 
+                           if (!response.ok) {
+                             throw new Error(
+                               "Failed to delete evaluation criteria"
+                             );
+                           }
+ 
+                           // Remove from local state
+                           setEvaluationCriteria((prev) =&gt;
+                             prev.filter((c) =&gt; c.uuid !== criteria.uuid)
+                           );
+                         } catch (err) {
+                           console.error(
+                             "Error deleting evaluation criteria:",
+                             err
+                           );
+                           alert(
+                             err instanceof Error
+                               ? err.message
+                               : "Failed to delete evaluation criteria"
+                           );
+                         }
+                       }}
+                       className="w-10 h-10 flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-muted-foreground hover:text-red-500 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+                       title="Delete criteria"
+                     &gt;
+                       &lt;svg
+                         className="w-5 h-5"
+                         fill="none"
+                         viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                         stroke="currentColor"
+                         strokeWidth={1.5}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;path
+                           strokeLinecap="round"
+                           strokeLinejoin="round"
+                           d="M14.74 9l-.346 9m-4.788 0L9.26 9m9.968-3.21c.342.052.682.107 1.022.166m-1.022-.165L18.16 19.673a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244 2.077H8.084a2.25 2.25 0 01-2.244-2.077L4.772 5.79m14.456 0a48.108 48.108 0 00-3.478-.397m-12 .562c.34-.059.68-.114 1.022-.165m0 0a48.11 48.11 0 013.478-.397m7.5 0v-.916c0-1.18-.91-2.164-2.09-2.201a51.964 51.964 0 00-3.32 0c-1.18.037-2.09 1.022-2.09 2.201v.916m7.5 0a48.667 48.667 0 00-7.5 0"
+                         /&gt;
+                       &lt;/svg&gt;

+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ))}
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+ 
+       {/* Add Evaluation Criteria Sidebar */}
+       {addCriteriaSidebarOpen &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="fixed inset-0 z-50 flex justify-end"&gt;
+           {/* Backdrop */}
+           &lt;div
+             className="absolute inset-0 bg-black/50"
+             onClick={() =&gt; {

+               setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(false);
+             }}

+           &lt;div className="relative w-full max-w-xl bg-background border-l border-border flex flex-col h-full shadow-2xl"&gt;

+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5 text-muted-foreground"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={1.5}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M9 12.75L11.25 15 15 9.75m-3-7.036A11.959 11.959 0 013.598 6 11.99 11.99 0 003 9.749c0 5.592 3.824 10.29 9 11.623 5.176-1.332 9-6.03 9-11.622 0-1.31-.21-2.571-.598-3.751h-.152c-3.196 0-6.1-1.248-8.25-3.285z"
+                   /&gt;

+                 &lt;h2 className="text-lg font-semibold"&gt;
+                   Add evaluation criteria
+                 &lt;/h2&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;button
+                 onClick={() =&gt; {
+                   resetCriteriaForm();
+                   setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(false);
+                 }}
+                 className="flex items-center justify-center w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-border hover:bg-muted transition-colors cursor-pointer"
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;svg
+                   className="w-5 h-5"
+                   fill="none"
+                   viewBox="0 0 24 24"
+                   stroke="currentColor"
+                   strokeWidth={2}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;path
+                     strokeLinecap="round"
+                     strokeLinejoin="round"
+                     d="M6 18L18 6M6 6l12 12"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/svg&gt;
+               &lt;/button&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+

+               {/* Criteria name */}

+                 &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-2"&gt;
+                   Criteria name
+                 &lt;/label&gt;
+                 &lt;input
+                   type="text"

+                   className="w-full h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent"

+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setCriteriaInstructions(e.target.value)}

+                   placeholder="Describe how the agent should evaluate whether the
