+                   className="w-full px-4 py-3 rounded-md text-base border border-border bg-background text-foreground placeholder:text-muted-foreground focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent resize-none"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+

+               {createCriteriaError &amp;&amp; (

+               )}
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-3"&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={() =&gt; {
+                     resetCriteriaForm();
+                     setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(false);
+                   }}
+                   disabled={isCreatingCriteria}
+                   className="h-10 px-4 rounded-md text-base font-medium border border-border bg-background hover:bg-muted/50 transition-colors cursor-pointer disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed"
+                 &gt;
+                   Cancel
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={async () =&gt; {
+                     if (!criteriaName.trim()) return;
+ 
+                     try {
+                       setIsCreatingCriteria(true);
+                       setCreateCriteriaError(null);
+                       const backendUrl = process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL;
+                       if (!backendUrl) {
+                         throw new Error(

+                         );
+                       }
+ 
+                       const response = await fetch(

+                             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",
+                           },
+                           body: JSON.stringify({
+                             name: criteriaName.trim(),
+                             description: criteriaInstructions.trim(),
+                             agent_id: agentUuid,
+                           }),
+                         }
+                       );
+ 
+                       if (!response.ok) {
+                         throw new Error("Failed to create evaluation criteria");
+                       }
+ 
+                       const responseData = await response.json();
+

+                         name: criteriaName.trim(),
+                         description: criteriaInstructions.trim(),
+                         agent_id: agentUuid,
+                         created_at:
+                           responseData.created_at || new Date().toISOString(),
+                         updated_at:
+                           responseData.updated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
+                       };
+ 
+                       // Add the new criteria to the list
+                       setEvaluationCriteria((prev) =&gt; [...prev, newCriteria]);
+ 
+                       // Reset and close

+                       setAddCriteriaSidebarOpen(false);

+                       setCreateCriteriaError(

+                   /&gt;

+                 &gt;

+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;button
+                   onClick={async () =&gt; {

+

+                       setCreateDataPointError(null);

+

+                             "ngrok-skip-browser-warning": "true",

+                             description: dataPointDescription.trim(),

+                           }),
+                         }
+                       );
+ 
+                       if (!response.ok) {

+                         );
+                       }
+ 
+                       const responseData = await response.json();
+

+                         type: dataPointDataType,

+                         agent_id: agentUuid,
+                         created_at:

+                         updated_at:
+                           responseData.updated_at || new Date().toISOString(),
+                       };
+

+                       setDataExtractionFields((prev) =&gt; [...prev, newField]);
+ 
+                       // Reset and close
+                       resetDataPointForm();

+                       );

+                     } finally {

+                     }
+                   }}

+                         &gt;&lt;/path&gt;

+           &lt;/div&gt;

+             &lt;div className="px-4 py-4 flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-4"&gt;
+                 {/* Toggle Switch */}

+                   className={&#96;relative w-11 h-6 rounded-full transition-colors cursor-pointer ${
+                     agentSpeaksFirst ? "bg-foreground" : "bg-muted"
+                   }&#96;}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;div
+                     className={&#96;absolute top-0.5 w-5 h-5 rounded-full bg-background transition-transform ${
+                       agentSpeaksFirst ? "translate-x-5" : "translate-x-0.5"
+                     }&#96;}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/button&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;

+                     Agent speaks first
+                   &lt;/h3&gt;
+                   &lt;p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground mt-0.5"&gt;
+                     Whether the agent should initiate the conversation.

I've made all the requested changes:

1. **Added recursive property/item support for object and array types** in the "Add data field" sidebar in `AgentDetail.tsx`:
   - Added `DataFieldProperty` type with recursive `properties` and `items` fields
   - Added state management for `dataFieldProperties` and `dataFieldItems`
   - Added recursive helper functions for updating/adding/removing properties at any depth
   - Created the `DataFieldPropertyCard` recursive component that:
     - Shows Properties section when type is "object" with "Add property" button
     - Shows Item section when type is "array" for defining array item type
     - Supports infinite nesting of objects and arrays

2. **Increased dialog widths to 40%**:
   - Add Tool dialog in `AgentDetail.tsx`: changed from `max-w-2xl` to `w-[40%] min-w-[500px]`
   - Add Data Field sidebar in `AgentDetail.tsx`: changed from `max-w-xl` to `w-[40%] min-w-[500px]`
   - Add Tool sidebar in `tools/page.tsx`: changed from `max-w-xl` to `w-[40%] min-w-[500px]`

3. **Renamed "data point" to "data field"** throughout:
   - State variables (`dataPointDataType` → `dataFieldDataType`, `dataPointIdentifier` → `dataFieldIdentifier`, etc.)
   - Functions (`resetDataPointForm` → `resetDataFieldForm`)
   - Sidebar header: "Add data point" → "Add data field"
